response.justification: Maria is an exceptionally skilled individual contributor with 20 years of development experience and proven ability to architect and ship products across diverse platforms. However, the role requires a mid-to-senior manager with 2 years of documented people management experience—this requirement is entirely absent from the resume. While recent developer tooling work at re:cinq is relevant, the broader career shows fragmented exposure to build systems and infrastructure rather than the 3-year focus this role demands. The progression through Senior and Staff titles lacks supporting evidence of how they led teams, mentored engineers, developed direct reports, or drove organizational change—all core responsibilities of this position.
strengths: Exceptional technical breadth across 20 years spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure; demonstrated ability to contribute meaningfully and ship at scale

Current role at re:cinq includes developer tooling (MCP code generators, AI infrastructure) directly aligned with the productivity/tools focus; proven track record building high-performance, low-latency systems
Strong open-source contributions (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and evidence of knowledge-sharing through workshops, Code Katas, and mentoring-adjacent activities
concerns: Zero documented people management experience—no evidence of managing reports, conducting performance reviews, developing team members, or hiring. This is a core requirement (2 years minimum) for a people-leadership role

Developer tools experience is fragmented (NI IDE ~1 year, Altom CI/DevOps ~2 years, recent MCP tooling ~5 months); lacks the sustained 3-year depth in build systems, test automation, or compiler infrastructure this role requires

Technical leadership narrative missing; while Senior and Staff titles suggest seniority, the resume emphasizes individual technical contributions and breadth rather than architectural leadership, team mentoring, cross-team influence, or organizational change

key_factors.factor: Strong technical foundation and current tooling alignment
